overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a character walking along a muddy commercial street lined with brick buildings including a stables and livery. The scene features overcast lighting, industrial smokestacks in the background, and occasional pedestrians and horse riders passing by.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a brick wall on a dirt sidewalk, following an NPC in a dark suit ahead

wooden telephone pole with crossbars and wires
red brick commercial building with STABLES signage visible in the distance
railroad tracks running parallel to the street on the right side
tall factory smokestacks emitting smoke visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt sidewalk beside a tall brick wall with an iron fence. An NPC in a suit walks ahead in the same direction. In the distance, a stables building and industrial smokestacks are visible under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street front with stables and horse traffic

events.description: pedestrian in white shirt and hat passes by walking in the opposite direction
horse rider approaches from behind and passes by on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street past the stables building, moving aside as a horse rider passes by on the right

notable_agents.action: man in white shirt and hat walking past in the opposite direction
rider on horseback trotting past the character on the right side of the muddy street

piles of wooden boxes and crates stacked outside the stables entrance
black horse-drawn carriage visible further down the street

segments.scene_description: The character passes the stables building with its distinctive red barn doors and stacked crates. A pedestrian in a white shirt passes by in the opposite direction, followed by a horse rider trotting past on the right. The street opens up slightly revealing a horse-drawn carriage in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: livery and boarding house street front with open stable entrance

agents.ego_description: walking past the livery building with its large open entrance, continuing down the muddy commercial street

entered.detail: red brick building with painted LIVERY & BOARDING signage
large dark open doorway leading into the livery stable interior
wooden ladder leaning against the building wall near the entrance
weathered painted sign reading LIVERY & BOARDING SALE STABLE on the brick wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks past the livery and boarding building, featuring a large dark open entrance and a weathered painted sign. A wooden ladder leans against the wall. The street ahead appears empty, with industrial buildings and smokestacks visible in the distance under the overcast sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a muddy commercial street that transitions from a narrow corridor of brick walls to a more open industrial district. It begins on a dirt sidewalk beside a tall brick wall and iron fence, trailing an NPC in a suit while industrial smokestacks loom in the distance under an overcast sky. As the camera advances, the scene opens up to pass a stables building with red barn doors and stacked crates, where a pedestrian and a horse rider cross the character's path. The movement then shifts past a livery and boarding house marked by a weathered sign and a leaning wooden ladder, revealing a horse-drawn carriage further down the road. Finally, the street clears of people, leaving the camera to face the distant industrial buildings and smokestacks beneath the gray horizon.
